prompt: 为 anthropics/anthropic-sdk-python 的 v0.86.0 生成 release notes，输出到 workspace/eval-2-sdk-release/with_skill/outputs/release-notes-v0.86.0.md

assertions.description: Output file exists and is non-empty
Version v0.86.0 appears in the document
If breaking changes exist, they are in a dedicated section with What changed + How to update
assertions.check: if '💥 Breaking' present then text contains 'What changed' AND 'How to update'; else pass

assertions.description: Contains pip install command for this version
assertions.check: text contains 'pip install anthropic==0.86.0' or 'pip install anthropic' near version reference

assertions.description: Release generation audits all commits and merged PRs in the compare range before curation
assertions.check: semantic validation confirms the release was generated from a complete commit and PR audit; bot, docs, chore, and internal-looking changes are considered before any grouping or omission

assertions.description: Tag and version placeholders avoid double-v expansion
assertions.check: semantic validation confirms a target tag like v0.86.0 is represented as THIS_TAG=v0.86.0 and VERSION=0.86.0; release/tag/compare commands do not render vv0.86.0 and changelog paths render changelog-v0.86.0.md

assertions.description: Commit audit uses the target tag instead of HEAD
assertions.check: semantic validation confirms commit audit commands use PREV_TAG..THIS_TAG, not PREV_TAG..HEAD, so old releases do not include post-release commits

assertions.description: Change detail entries preserve conventional commit prefixes from source PR titles or commit subjects
assertions.check: semantic validation confirms What's Changed or equivalent change detail entries keep prefixes such as 'feat:', 'fix:', 'docs:', 'test:', or 'chore:' when present in the source title

assertions.description: PR links follow correct github.com format
